_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of autophagy as a novel treatment for neurofibromatosis type 1 tumors.

_contextSnippet: dNF1‐KO cells showed an increased rate of growth as measured using CellTiter‐Glo assays...This suggests that the difference in culture growth is primarily due to increased cell proliferation
details: Showed increased rate of growth in both presence and absence of serum when dNF1 was knocked out, with increased cell proliferation rather than cell size
